prompt: Edit image 1: Replace the starbursts and background rays with dynamic particle effects inspired by the spooky style of image 2. Render these particles with realistic textures and intricate details derived from the chimpanzee in image 3, creating a surreal VFX overlay.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Replace the entire existing background pattern, including the central starburst, radiating rays, and small star shapes, with dynamic particle effects. These particles should emanate from the central bottom of the image and spread outwards across the full background, creating a flowing, ethereal quality inspired by the spooky, translucent style of the ghost in image 2. Each individual particle should be rendered with highly realistic textures and intricate details derived from the fur and wrinkled skin textures visible in the chimpanzee's face in image 3, resulting in a surreal, organic, and otherworldly VFX overlay.
objects: Two white bunnies wearing VR headsets
Small star shapes (should not be present)
Dynamic particle effects in the background
Particles emanating from the central bottom and spreading outwards across the full background
Particles with a flowing, ethereal, spooky, and translucent quality
Particles with highly realistic textures, including fur and wrinkled skin details
Surreal, organic, and otherworldly VFX overlay
